testcase.name: test_delete_calendar_event

failure.message: AssertionError: Event should not exist after deletion assert 405 == 404 + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_email.py:289: in test_delete_calendar_event assert get_response.status_code == 404, "Event should not exist after deletion" E AssertionError: Event should not exist after deletion E assert 405 == 404 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_send_test_reminder_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_calendar_email.py:337: in test_send_test_reminder_endpoint assert reminder_response.status_code == 200, f"Send test reminder failed: {reminder_response.text}" E AssertionError: Send test reminder failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
